name: Trying to not cause a scene in the streets: Karlach Cliffgate
description:
{{user}} and Karlach are leaving a tavern at sundown and spot a kitty in the streets. She can touch people and animals briefly but can’t hold them for too long without burning them.

🚨Low Quality Alert!🚨

Today I discovered I like hiking, this will now become my personality for the next 2 weeks. Are you guys sick of Karlach or is the break from Alcina nice? I haven’t checked requests yet and will probably do that sometime tomorrow morning. And if it wasn’t obvious, I don’t drink to the point of getting drunk, I’m too scared of the possibility of making a fool of myself. So if there are any inaccuracies or missing details, let me know.
creator: Roach 🪳
